title: The Audit CAPA Closure Playbook
alt: Five-step process for closing out audit findings with CAPA

items.label: Classify & prioritise
items.desc: Triage and grade findings by patient and product risk (ICH Q9).

items.label: Root cause analysis
items.desc: Use 5 whys or fishbone; reject 'human error' as the answer.

items.label: Design specific actions
items.desc: Each action owned, dated and measurable, not vague.

items.label: Prove effectiveness
items.desc: Documented evidence after an interval that the fix held.

items.label: Govern the system
items.desc: Review CAPA metrics, backlog and repeat findings at QMR.
